layers.name: Valuation & Earnings Power
layers.purpose: Models the trajectory as a financial asset — the DCF and NPV layer for careers, with engines for path valuation and major present-value decisions.
layers.roadmap_theme: education NPV, sabbatical NPV, present-value sensitivity

layers.name: Volatility, Risk & Downside
layers.purpose: Models the downside, fragility, and tail risk of a path.
layers.roadmap_theme: stochastic simulation, downturn stress-tests, sector mobility

layers.name: Skill Capital & ROI
layers.purpose: Models the ROI and stacking effect of credential and skill investments.

layers.name: Geography & Mobility
layers.purpose: Models geography premia, cost drag, and mobility decisions across cities and borders.

layers.name: Path Comparison & Portfolio
layers.purpose: Models multiple trajectories side by side; constructs the career as a portfolio.
layers.roadmap_theme: offer decomposition, portfolio construction, firm tiers, equity, raises

layers.name: Strategic Optionality & Founder
layers.purpose: Will model strategic optionality, founder convexity, and exit-path asymmetries — the framework where downside-bounded upside lives.
layers.roadmap_theme: founder EV, exit paths, optionality maps, income-optionality threshold

tools.name: Professional Capital Value
tools.purpose: The discounted present value of your career, modeled as a financial asset.
tools.decision: What is this trajectory worth as a financial asset?

tools.name: MBA NPV Calculator
tools.purpose: Discount the cost of two years against the lifetime earnings delta.
tools.forward: Will discount the cost of two years against the lifetime earnings delta.

tools.name: PhD NPV Calculator
tools.purpose: Long-horizon valuation of a doctoral path with academic and exit branches.
tools.forward: Will value a doctoral path across academic and exit branches.

tools.name: Sabbatical NPV Impact
tools.purpose: What does a 6–18 month pause cost in present value terms?
tools.forward: Will quantify the present-value cost of a 6–18 month career pause.

tools.name: FIRE Threshold Calculator
tools.purpose: The wealth point at which earned income becomes optional — the income-optionality threshold.
tools.forward: Will compute the wealth point at which earned income becomes optional — the income-optionality threshold.

tools.name: Offer Decomposer
tools.purpose: Break a job offer into base, variable, equity, and option value components before comparison.
tools.forward: Will break an offer into base, variable, equity, and option components — the input layer that feeds Path Comparison.

tools.name: Career Volatility Index
tools.purpose: The risk-adjusted profile of a trajectory. How fragile is this path?
tools.decision: How fragile is the current path under stress?

tools.name: Monte Carlo Trajectory
tools.purpose: Stochastic simulation of career outcomes across thousands of paths.
tools.forward: Will simulate thousands of career outcomes stochastically.

tools.name: Recession Stress Test
tools.purpose: What happens to your trajectory in a 2008 or 2020-scale downturn?
tools.forward: Will model trajectory impact under a 2008 or 2020-scale downturn.

tools.name: AI Displacement Index
tools.purpose: Role-level exposure to automation over a 10-year horizon.
tools.forward: Will quantify role-level automation exposure over a 10-year horizon.

tools.name: Sector Mobility Index
tools.purpose: How readily can you exit this sector if it compresses?
tools.forward: Will measure how easily this sector can be exited under compression.

tools.name: Skill ROI Engine
tools.purpose: Treat skill acquisition as a capital allocation decision with a measurable return.
tools.decision: Is this skill or credential investment worth the time and cost?

tools.name: Specialization Premium
tools.purpose: What does deep specialization pay over a generalist track?
tools.forward: Will quantify what deep specialization pays over a generalist track.

tools.name: Network Compound Engine
tools.purpose: Network as compounding capital. What does it return?
tools.forward: Will model network as compounding capital with a measurable return.

tools.name: Reputation Index
tools.purpose: Reputation as a measurable asset that compounds compensation premium.
tools.forward: Will measure reputation as a compounding compensation premium.

tools.name: City Move Calculator
tools.purpose: Real wealth after rent, tax, and cost-of-living adjustments.
tools.decision: What does a city move actually do to real compensation?

tools.name: International Premium Map
tools.purpose: Cross-border compensation arbitrage with cost-of-living parity.
tools.forward: Will compute cross-border compensation arbitrage with COL parity.

tools.name: Cohort Benchmark
tools.purpose: Your position vs. a calibrated peer cohort across geography and role.
tools.decision: Where does this compensation sit in the cohort?
tools.output: Percentile · cohort spread · ₹L gap to median

tools.name: Trajectory Engine
tools.purpose: Multi-year scenario projection of your career under chosen assumptions.
tools.decision: How does this single career path unfold year by year?

tools.name: Portfolio Analyzer
tools.purpose: Treat your career as a portfolio of skills, roles, and option positions.
tools.forward: Will treat the career as a portfolio of skills, roles, and option positions.

tools.name: Barbell Allocator
tools.purpose: Stable income paired with asymmetric upside. Calibrate the barbell.
tools.forward: Will calibrate stable income against asymmetric upside positions.

tools.name: Path Comparison Engine
tools.purpose: Compare two professional trajectories side by side. PCV, percentile, risk-adjusted return — which path wins, and by how much.
tools.decision: Of two paths, which produces more lifetime value after risk?

tools.name: Firm Tier Classifier
tools.purpose: Tier this firm against a calibrated firm-quality benchmark.
tools.forward: Will tier this firm against a calibrated firm-quality benchmark.

tools.name: Bonus Ratio Benchmark
tools.purpose: Variable comp as a share of total. Where do you sit on the ratio curve?
tools.forward: Will place variable compensation on the cluster-specific ratio curve.

tools.name: Equity Calibration
tools.purpose: Value equity grants honestly: dilution, vesting, liquidity, expected exit.
tools.forward: Will value equity grants honestly across dilution, vesting, and exit.

tools.name: Raise Benchmark
tools.purpose: What's a market-rate raise for your role, tenure, and performance band?
tools.forward: Will compute market-rate raises for role, tenure, and performance band.

tools.name: Founder EV Simulator
tools.purpose: Expected value of a founder path under realistic exit distributions.
tools.forward: Will compute the expected value of a founder path under realistic exit distributions.

tools.name: Exit Path Decomposer
tools.purpose: Map the realistic exits from your current role. Probabilities and payoffs.
tools.forward: Will map realistic exits from the current role with probabilities and payoffs.

tools.name: Optionality Tree
tools.purpose: The tree of future moves your current position keeps open.
tools.forward: Will surface the tree of future moves a current position keeps open.

tools.name: Moat Builder
tools.purpose: What is your defensible advantage? How is it compounding?
tools.forward: Will identify the defensible advantage and measure its compounding rate.

tools.name: Negotiation Lever Map
tools.purpose: The levers available in this specific negotiation, ranked by leverage.
tools.forward: Will rank negotiation levers by leverage in a specific situation.

tools.name: Career Thesis Builder
tools.purpose: Your career thesis written as an investment memo. Falsifiable assumptions.
tools.forward: Will articulate the career thesis as a falsifiable investment memo.
